repair_plan.repaired_text_preview:
script_interface
   debug
end_script_interface

antenna_pattern SEARCH_ANTENNA
   constant_pattern
      peak_gain 30 dB
      azimuth_beamwidth 10 deg
      elevation_beamwidth 10 deg
   end_constant_pattern
end_antenna_pattern

group g_template WSF_GROUP end_group

observer
   enable SIMULATION_INITIALIZING CreateGroups
end_observer

script void CreateGroups()
   WsfSimulation.CreateGroup("GROUP1","g_template");
   WsfSimulation.CreateGroup("GROUP2","g_template");
end_script

platform_type BASIC_STATION WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_GROUND_MOVER
      maximum_speed 1 m/sec
      minimum_speed 0 m/sec
   end_mover

   comm BASIC_COMM WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
      internal_link track_proc
   end_comm

   processor track_proc WSF_TRACK_PROCESSOR
      report_interval 2 sec
      circular_report_rejection on
      update_interval 10 sec

      on_message
         type WSF_TRACK_MESSAGE
         script
            WsfTrackMessage tmsg = (WsfTrackMessage)MESSAGE;
            if(tmsg.Originator() != PLATFORM.Name())
            {
               print("T=",TIME_NOW," P=",PLATFORM.Name(),"  Track ",tmsg.Track().TargetName()," received from ",tmsg.Originator());
            }
         end_script
      end_on_message
   end_processor

   sensor radar WSF_RADAR_SENSOR
      frame_time 2 sec
      minimum_range 0 nm
      maximum_range 80 nm
      reports_location
      reports_range
      reports_bearing
      transmitter
         antenna_pattern SEARCH_ANTENNA
         power 150 kw
         pulse_width 2.0e-6 sec
         pulse_repetition_frequency 400 hz
         frequency 1285 mhz
      end_transmitter
      receiver
         antenna_pattern SEARCH_ANTENNA
         bandwidth 1 mhz
      end_receiver
   end_sensor
end_platform_type

platform detector BASIC_STATION
   side blue
   route
      position 30.67n 104.07e altitude 0 m msl speed 0 m/sec
   end_route
   sensor radar
      on
   end_sensor
   group add GROUP1
end_platform

platform relay BASIC_STATION
   side blue
   route
      position 30.70n 104.10e altitude 0 m msl speed 0 m/sec
   end_route
   sensor radar
      off
   end_sensor
   group add GROUP1
   group add GROUP2
end_platform

platform observer BASIC_STATION
   side blue
   route
      position 30.73n 104.13e altitude 0 m msl speed 0 m/sec
   end_route
   sensor radar
      off
   end_sensor
   group add GROUP2
end_platform

event_pipe
   file output/group_comm_example.aer
end_event_pipe

event_output
   file output/group_comm_example.evt
end_event_output

end_time 240 sec
